changelog: New launcher icon — installed the AI-generated 'screen + play' design as the official Android app icon, with full coverage across all densities (mdpi 48 → xxxhdpi 192), legacy round + adaptive (Android 8+) variants, dark-navy adaptive background to match the icon's outer tile, and a 1280×720 Leanback TV banner for Shield / Fire TV / Google TV launchers. The same artwork is now used in the side rail collapsed brand mark so the in-app and launcher marks match exactly.
